docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,496.70 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, JONATHAN BANOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
